submissions.basis: The corrective head rejects lone and invalid surrogate forms consistently, preserves valid-pair canonicalization, executes paired malformed/depth/document/unsupported-type hostility in both languages, uses an explicit unsigned bytewise Lua comparator, passes locked Dart 9/9 and deterministic Lua 9/0, preserves the frozen R-007 Workflow authority and shared Council-safe kernel, and changes no dependency/runtime/product boundary.

advisories.finding: The initial corpus omitted executable depth/document/unsupported-type/malformed-Unicode coverage, and Dart accepted lone-surrogate escapes that the Lua path rejected.
advisories.smallest_same_owner_correction: Validate Dart surrogate pairing; add shared hostile/boundary corpus cases and paired encode-side tests in both suites; use an explicit unsigned bytewise Lua key comparator.

reviews.basis: Fresh Opus reproduced locked Dart analysis and 9/9 tests plus two deterministic substrate-Lua 9/0 runs; verified shared-corpus byte and digest parity, hostile Unicode/depth/byte/number/duplicate/unsupported cases, explicit unsigned Lua ordering, exact 24-route family, four-commit provenance and scope, exactly two primary dependencies, Workflow/Council authority, and no runtime/UI/reference-package import.
limitations: Parity is proven for the frozen shared corpus and exact pinned substrate binary.
R-011, R-022, R-043, and R-059 retain assignment, runtime, manifest, and historical-suite closure.
